# graph-agent-dev-kit

> Unified Go SDK for AI agents, knowledge graphs, and RAG pipelines.

Combines three packages: agent (streaming AI agent loop with tool dispatch, provider adapters, and RLHF feedback), kg (knowledge graph construction with SurrealDB), and rag (multi-modal RAG pipelines with chunking, retrieval, and reranking).

## Docs

- [README](README.md): Overview, installation, quick start
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Architecture, packages, commands, code style
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): Development setup, commit conventions

## Key Files

- Agent: agent/agent.go, agent/core/provider.go, agent/core/tool.go, agent/core/message.go, agent/core/delta.go, agent/core/content.go, agent/core/node.go
- KG: kg/config.go, kg/kgtypes/kgtypes.go, kg/surrealdb/store.go
- RAG: rag/config.go, rag/ragtypes/ragtypes.go, rag/internal/pipeline/pipeline.go
